text: Boards of supervisors in their respective counties may by ordinance reduce the permissible weight of vehicles and loads upon unimproved county highways or upon county bridges.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 15. SIZE, WEIGHT, AND LOAD [35000 - 35796]
### Chapter 5. Weight [35550 - 35796]
#### Article 4. Local Authorities [35700 - 35722]
##### § 35706

Boards of supervisors in their respective counties may by ordinance reduce the permissible weight of vehicles and loads upon unimproved county highways or upon county bridges.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*
